list.title: Portfolio Website
list.desc: Personal portfolio, smooth scroll, GSAP animations, and i18n support.

list.title: K-Space CMS
list.desc: Community-driven CMS for sharing engineering notes, product updates and collaborative stories.

list.title: K-Shop
list.desc: Modern e-commerce storefront focused on clean product browsing and a fast shopping flow.

kShop.title: K-Shop
kShop.tagline: A fast, modern storefront built for smooth shopping.
kShop.desc: K-Shop is an e-commerce web app built with React and Vite, focused on clean browsing, responsive product presentation, and a smooth purchase journey from discovery to checkout.

features.title: Key Features
list: Responsive shopping UI across mobile and desktop
Clean product listing and browsing flow
Fast navigation and rendering with Vite
Consistent visual system with Tailwind CSS

kSpaceCms.title: K-Space CMS
kSpaceCms.tagline: Community for Builders, Thinkers and Creators.
kSpaceCms.desc: A community-driven CMS platform built with Next.js, Express, and Supabase. Designed for developers and creators to share engineering notes, product updates, and collaborative stories in one unified space.
kSpaceCms.serverNotice: This project connects to a real online database. Response may be slow if the server is sleeping.

features.title: Key Features
list: Rich text editing with TipTap editor

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.tagline: Designed, built and shipped by me.
portfolio.desc: A personal portfolio built with React, Vite, TypeScript and GSAP. Features smooth scroll, horizontal pin scroll, entrance animations, and light/dark mode. Everything you see on this page is custom-crafted from scratch.
portfolio.youAreHere: You are currently browsing this portfolio. This page is the live demo.

highlights.title: What's Inside
list: GSAP ScrollSmoother for buttery smooth page scroll
Light / Dark mode via CSS custom properties
Responsive layout from mobile to widescreen
